description: The chart displays only two data points per country (1990 and 1991), yet is titled as if it covers the full 1990–2013 period. With just a single connecting line segment per series, readers are misled into thinking these two-point "trends" represent the countries' long-term trajectories, when in reality the full dataset reveals far more complex patterns (e.g., India's rise and fall, China's steady decline).
